Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and low glucose, which may indicate hypoglycemia. Alkaline phosphatase is mildly elevated, possibly reflecting hepatobiliary or bone involvement. LDL cholesterol is high, increasing cardiovascular risk. Globulin is reported low, but the unit appears inconsistent; please verify. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal function and lipid management.
Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
